mapper.sql: from payment_channel_capability cc left join payment_method m on m.method_code = cc.method_code and m.tenant_id = cc.tenant_id and m.del_flag = 0 left join payment_channel c on c.id = cc.channel_id and c.tenant_id = cc.tenant_id and c.del_flag = 0
mapper.select:
select cc.id, cc.channel_id as channelId, c.channel_name as channelName, cc.method_code as methodCode, m.method_name as methodName, cc.terminal_type as terminalType, cc.environment, cc.supports_refund as supportsRefund, cc.supports_query as supportsQuery, cc.supports_close as supportsClose, cc.supports_bill as supportsBill, cc.supports_reconcile as supportsReconcile, cc.min_amount as minAmount, cc.max_amount as maxAmount, cc.status, cc.created_at as createTime, cc.updated_at as updateTime
order by cc.created_at desc, cc.id desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}

select cc.id, cc.channel_id as channelId, c.channel_name as channelName, cc.method_code as methodCode, m.method_name as methodName, cc.terminal_type as terminalType, cc.environment, cc.supports_refund as supportsRefund, cc.supports_query as supportsQuery, cc.supports_close as supportsClose, cc.supports_bill as supportsBill, cc.supports_reconcile as supportsReconcile, cc.min_amount as minAmount, cc.max_amount as maxAmount, cc.status, cc.created_at as createTime, cc.updated_at as updateTime
where cc.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and cc.id = #{id} and cc.del_flag = 0

select ( (select count(1) from payment_channel_contract_capability ccc where ccc.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and ccc.channel_capability_id = #{capabilityId}) + (select count(1) from payment_method_route_rule_item rri join payment_channel_contract_capability ccc on ccc.id = rri.contract_capability_id and ccc.tenant_id = rri.tenant_id where rri.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and ccc.channel_capability_id = #{capabilityId}) )
